rationale: The pattern improves executive readability and evidence placement, but it should stay in governed trial mode until manual leadership review confirms the communication benefits in real ProductOS work.
extracted_rules: Open with the recommendation before historical context.
Keep source-linked evidence visible on every material claim slide.
Reserve typography-first hero treatments for Tier 3 leadership and strategy communication.
risk_controls: Do not allow the pattern to hide blockers, confidence limits, or unresolved questions.
Keep manual validation mandatory before wider internal adoption.
Require publish checks for both HTML and PPT export targets.
publish_constraints: Internal-only until leadership review confirms the pattern does not overstate certainty.
Do not use for customer-safe communication without a dedicated customer audience pass.
